head.title: Intellectual property | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Intellectual property solicitors helping brands, creators and businesses protect, manage and defend the ideas, assets and innovations that drive growth.
head.ogDescription: Intellectual property solicitors helping brands, creators and businesses protect, manage and defend the ideas, assets and innovations that drive growth.

blocks.html:
Intellectual Property

Protecting intellectual property is about more than legal rights. It is about securing the value behind your brand and giving you the confidence to develop, launch and grow. We work with brands, creators and growing businesses to protect the intangible assets that set them apart. Whether you are safeguarding a new concept or defending an established brand, we provide clear, commercially focused advice that supports your wider business goals.

For businesses
Intellectual Property

Services

If your business relies on ideas, reputation or innovation, our intellectual property solicitors are here to help you protect and maximise their value.

Speak to an expert

Copyright

Protect, manage, and enforce your copyright with practical advice that safeguards your creative and digital assets.

Design Rights

Protect the appearance of your products with clear, commercially focused advice on UK and EU design rights.

Intellectual Property Enforcement

If your intellectual property is under threat, we act quickly to protect your brand, products and reputation.

Trade Marks

Protect what makes your business distinctive with clear, practical trade mark support from first search through to long term portfolio management.

Experts in every area
